text:
Cannot apply the patch. Could you submit it again?

Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...

|--- arcconf.orig/Makefile       2019-04-07 06:04:44.000000000 +0000
|+++ arcconf/Makefile    2019-06-23 09:29:07.164130000 +0000
